from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_all_items_processed():
    input_items = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
    expected_output = [x * 2 for x in input_items]
    result = process_batch(input_items)
    assert len(result) == len(input_items), f"Expected result length {len(input_items)}, got {len(result)}"
    assert result == expected_output, f"Expected doubled values {expected_output}, got {result}"
